---
name: math-with-tools
object_config:
  model_name: test-model
  schema:
    type: object
    properties:
      answer:
        type: string
    required:
      - answer
  tools:
    - calculator
input_schema:
  type: object
  properties:
    userMessage:
      type: string
  required:
    - userMessage
---

<System>
You are a helpful math tutor. Use the calculator tool when needed.
</System>

<User>
{props.userMessage}
</User>
